violations.text: Raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as deli meat, hot dogs and eggs in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025
The door to the room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the restroom and storage room area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
